subject: WM-0165 resource presentation blocker resolved
body: WM-0165 is unblocked in_progress with the existing Canvas claim. Contract commit 7f38bc1 approves only additive WorldEntityKind.resource in web-read-model.ts, exhaustive Pixi marker/selection handling, and localized HUD resource labels/tests; schema-v3, GameSession projection v1, validators, exports and authority are unchanged. Continue the default 1424x861 real-mouse resident/resource E2E, unavailable-selection clear/rapid identity tests, and TypeScript-aware gameplay source graph guard. Do not alias resource to structure or synthesize counts/trends.
